models.use: Failed open-vocabulary paddle detector probe for RKT detector+mask gate 1
notes: Downloaded through Hugging Face cache on pickleball-a100-spot-ase1a during RKT detector gate diagnosis on 2026-07-01 UTC.
GroundingDINO-base + SAM2 tiny tiled 15-frame sample at box/text threshold 0.05 reached recall 0.8333 and failed the detector+mask gate.
This is not DINO-X, not pickleball fine-tuned, and must not be promoted.

models.use: SAM2 tiny box-prompted mask checkpoint for RKT detector+mask gate 1
notes: Downloaded with huggingface_hub on 2026-07-01 into models/checkpoints/racket/sam2-hiera-tiny.
Local PyTorch MPS failed on SAM2 bicubic upsample; CPU inference was verified for this checkpoint.
Used only for real box-prompted masks after detector inference; it is not true corner or 6DoF evidence.

models.use: Failed local paddle-detector training probe for RKT detector gate diagnosis
notes: CPU training was stopped after two completed epochs because Outdoor validation recall stayed at 0.0024.
MPS training failed before producing weights with RuntimeError: view size is not compatible with input tensor's size and stride.
Detector-only 15-frame sample at conf=0.001 reached recall 0.4333 with 1152 detections; this checkpoint failed the RKT detector gate and must not be promoted.

models.use: Failed A100 paddle-detector training probe for RKT detector+mask gate diagnosis
models.source: Fine-tuned from models/checkpoints/yolo11n.pt on runs/cvat_imports/2026_06_30/yolo_datasets/paddle using pickleball-a100-spot-ase1a
notes: A100 training early-stopped after 21 epochs; best validation metrics were P=0.645, R=0.321, mAP50=0.322, mAP50-95=0.0954.
YOLO+SAM2 15-frame sample at conf=0.001 reached recall 1.0 but precision 0.0201 with 1489 detections; this was smoke-only and not gate verification.

Full-manifest detector-only sweep over 1426 reviewed rows at conf=0.001 reached overall recall 0.9240 but failed per-viewpoint recall because Outdoor was 0.8259; this checkpoint failed the RKT detector gate and must not be promoted.

models.use: Failed A100 high-resolution paddle-detector training probe for RKT detector gate diagnosis
models.source: Fine-tuned from models/checkpoints/yolo26s.pt on runs/cvat_imports/2026_06_30/yolo_datasets/paddle using pickleball-a100-spot-ase1a
notes: A100 training early-stopped after 21 epochs; best validation metrics were P=0.470, R=0.403, mAP50=0.356, mAP50-95=0.112.
Native Ultralytics validation at conf=0.001, imgsz=1280, batch=1, iou=0.25 on the 600-image validation split returned precision 0.4679 and recall 0.4010.
Batched full-manifest detector sweep attempts at imgsz=1280 failed with CUDA OOM at batch 16 and batch 4; no full-manifest pass was produced, and this checkpoint must not be promoted.

models.use: Temporal lift and smoothing candidate for Lane A body-17 windows before foot/hand One-Euro filtering
notes: Official MotionBERT repository is Apache-2.0 and targets 3D pose estimation and motion representation.
A100 validation on pickleball-a100-spot-ase1a downloaded the official Hugging Face mirror checkpoint for FT_MB_lite_MB_ft_h36m_global_lite/best_epoch.bin.
Torch checkpoint smoke on 2026-07-01 loaded model_pos and first tensor module.temp_embed with shape (1, 243, 1, 256).
Config /home/arnavchokshi/research/MotionBERT/configs/pose3d/MB_ft_h36m_global_lite.yaml declares maxlen 243 and num_joints 17.
Repo runtime adapter maps RTMW3D COCO body17 to MotionBERT H36M17, runs 243-frame windows, and merges supported body joints back while preserving unsupported COCO eye/ear joints.

A100 runtime smoke on 2026-07-01 loaded the checkpoint through MotionBERTTemporalRuntime and returned 17 refined body joints; it is not gate-bearing until cold-clip and labeled accuracy validation pass.
